final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cross-border e-commerce promotional poster with typographic art lettering and stacked font layers, designed for marketing campaign use in a 16:9 landscape format.

Style/medium: bold commercial poster design with layered typographic depth — art lettering as the visual spine, stacked type creating rhythmic density without chaos
Composition: 16:9 landscape, product or hero subject placed in the foreground deliberately masking portions of the stacked background type, creating a sense of spatial depth and visual tension between object and text
Subject: a prominent hero product (or brand mascot) positioned center-to-right, large enough to overlap and partially obscure the typographic layers behind it
Scene/backdrop: richly layered promotional backdrop built from stacked letterforms, decorative art lettering, and graphic elements — complex but organized by a clear visual hierarchy
Lighting/mood: the electric confidence of a flash-sale moment — sharp contrast, high-energy, the eye pulled forward by the product breaking through the type
Color palette: saturated commercial energy — bold primaries or brand-driven accent colors in conversation with a dark or high-contrast ground, warmth and urgency balanced
Materials/textures: crisp vector-sharp art lettering layered with slightly textured or gradient-filled stacked type, the product rendered with clean product-shot fidelity
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: art lettering must be visually distinct from body stacked type; product/subject must visibly overlap and occlude at least one layer of text; overall composition must feel complex yet structured — not chaotic; 16:9 aspect ratio
Avoid: sparse or minimal layouts, single-layer flat design, illegible text chaos, generic stock-photo collage aesthetic, stuffer decoration with no compositional purpose
